steps.title: Identify the Decisive Signal
steps.content: Text 2's key statement—there are creative ways to update the show plus the Hot Chocolate Nutcracker example—reveals Text 2's response to Text 1: not rejection, but modernization as an alternative path.

steps.title: Match the Signal to the Choices
steps.content:
Choice D matches this signal: it's the only option recognizing that Text 2 counters Text 1 by proposing revised versions instead of complete rejection.

The other choices either contradict what Text 2 states, misread audience response, or reduce the answer to just economics.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
